title: Enzyme Product Catalog
author: Lisa, Clara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Creative Enzymes is a professional biotechnology company offering a comprehensive range of enzyme products and related biological solutions. Our  enzyme product portfolio  encompasses complete solutions from basic enzymes to custom blends, including enzyme preparations, extracts, probiotics, zymogens, and coenzymes, serving multiple sectors such as food industry, agriculture, and scientific research. The company particularly excels in customization services, with the expertise to develop personalized product formulations according to specific client requirements.
